description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat roof, surrounded by a rectangular yard with green landscaping. The main structure is white with large windows, and there is a visible entryway with a small overhang. The property includes a driveway and a small garden area with trees and shrubs. The house is accompanied by several detached, block-like structures that may represent garages or outbuildings. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with a focus on geometric forms and open outdoor space. The windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, and the entryway is clearly defined by a recessed door and a paved path.
description: A modern, white, flat-roofed house with large windows, a green yard, and minimalist detached structures. The design is geometric and open, with a clear entryway and landscaped garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house, green yard, and detached block structures aligned behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the entryway, driveway, and the arrangement of detached structures to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard garden, trees, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open yard, house side wall, and the spatial separation of the detached blocks.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small overhang, paved path, and minimal decorative elements
